name: openclaw-android
description: Run OpenClaw on Android with a single command — no proot, no Linux
readme_summary: OpenClaw on Android allows users to run OpenClaw, a powerful tool, directly on their Android devices without the need for a full Linux distribution like proot-distro. It achieves this by installing only the necessary glibc dynamic linker, significantly reducing storage overhead and setup time while offering native performance.
key_features: Run OpenClaw on Android without proot-distro
Standalone Android app with integrated UI and terminal
Automatic path and environment conversion for Termux
primary_use_case: Enabling users to run OpenClaw and other Linux binaries on Android devices with minimal resource consumption and simplified setup.
cover_image_prompt: A skilled artisan, holding a small, intricate clockwork device (representing OpenClaw), is effortlessly assembling it directly onto the back of a sleek, modern smartphone. Instead of a cluttered workbench, the smartphone's screen itself acts as the assembly surface, displaying glowing digital blueprints and data streams. Tiny, glowing gears and circuits flow from the phone's display towards the clockwork device, symbolizing the streamlined installation process. The background is a clean, minimalist workshop with subtle Android green accents. The overall mood is one of efficiency and innovation, showcasing how complex software can be seamlessly integrated into everyday mobile devices. 3D isometric illustration style, vibrant yet clean color palette, high detail.

name: OpenSpace
description: "OpenSpace: Make Your Agents: Smarter, Low-Cost, Self-Evolving" -- Community: https://open-space.cloud/
readme_summary: OpenSpace is a self-evolving engine designed to make AI agents smarter, more cost-efficient, and capable of learning from real-world experience. It enhances existing agents by providing them with self-evolutionary skills, enabling them to automatically fix, improve, and learn from usage, while also facilitating collective intelligence through skill sharing among agents.
key_features: Collective Agent Intelligence (Shared evolution, Network effects, Easy sharing, Access control)
Token Efficiency (Reuse successful solutions, Reduced task costs, Small updates)
Compatibility with various agents (OpenClaw, nanobot, Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, etc.)
primary_use_case: To enhance existing AI agents by enabling them to learn, adapt, and evolve from experience, leading to improved performance, reduced costs, and shared intelligence across a network of agents.
cover_image_prompt: A wise old tree with roots deeply embedded in a network of interconnected glowing nodes, representing AI agents. Each leaf on the tree is a unique, evolving skill icon. From the branches, smaller saplings are growing, symbolizing new agents learning from the mature tree. Small digital particles representing data flow between the tree and the saplings. In the background, a subtle UI element shows a progress bar labeled 'Skill Evolution' and a token counter decreasing. The scene is set in a serene, digital landscape with soft, ambient lighting, rendered in a 3D isometric illustration style with a focus on organic growth and interconnectedness.

name: OSS-DocumentScanner
readme_summary: This repository hosts two open-source applications: OSS Document Scanner, an Android app for scanning documents, and Oss CardWallet, an app for managing digital cards. Both apps leverage advanced image processing and OCR technologies.
key_features: Document scanning with edge detection and perspective correction
primary_use_case: To provide users with a powerful and open-source mobile application for digitizing physical documents and extracting text from them.
cover_image_prompt: A 3D isometric illustration of a vintage scanner machine with a magnifying glass hovering over a stack of documents. The scanner is actively pulling a document through, and on the other side, a stream of digital text and clear icons representing organized files (like PDFs and images) are emerging. Subtle glowing lines connect the scanner to a small, stylized smartphone screen displaying a clean UI with scanning options. The background is a clean, modern workspace with soft, ambient lighting. The overall mood is efficient and user-friendly, emphasizing the transformation of physical paper into digital information. The repository name 'OSS Document Scanner' is subtly integrated into the design of the machine.

name: Raven
description: Document chat app for macOS / iOS. Upload files, ask questions. Everything runs locally on your Mac / iPhone.
readme_summary: Raven is a privacy-focused document chat application for macOS and iOS that allows users to upload files and ask questions, with all processing performed locally on the device using Apple Foundation Models. It extracts text from various file types, transcribes audio, and provides contextual answers and summaries without requiring internet connectivity.
key_features: Text extraction from images, PDFs, audio, and video files
Audio transcription and video text extraction
Smart Q&A and contextual content analysis
Local AI processing using Apple Foundation Models
Privacy-focused, all data stays on device
primary_use_case: Enabling users to interact with and gain insights from their documents through a local, private AI assistant on macOS and iOS.
cover_image_prompt: A wise, friendly owl perched on a stack of diverse documents (PDFs, images, audio tapes). The owl is holding a magnifying glass over one document, and from its beak, glowing streams of text and summarized insights are flowing into a stylized, minimalist user interface bubble. Subtle digital particles representing AI processing emanate from the owl. The background is a clean, modern desk with a hint of a macOS or iOS interface. The overall mood is intelligent, secure, and accessible. The art style should be a charming 3D isometric illustration with soft lighting and a calming color palette, emphasizing privacy and local processing.

name: memory-guardian
readme_summary: Memory Guardian is a lightweight Android application designed to enhance user privacy and security by automatically clearing the clipboard at user-defined intervals. It offers manual clearing, clipboard editing, and notifications, all within a minimalistic, ad-free, and permission-free interface.
primary_use_case: Protecting sensitive information from accidental exposure by automatically clearing the device's clipboard.
cover_image_prompt: A stylized, transparent digital shield hovering over a smartphone screen. Inside the shield, sensitive data like passwords (represented by padlock icons) are shown briefly before being gently swept away by a subtle, clean energy wave. On the side, a small, minimalist clock icon indicates timed clearing. The background is a soft, abstract gradient, with the 'Memory Guardian' name subtly integrated into the shield's design. The overall mood is one of calm security and effortless protection. Rendered in a clean, modern 3D isometric illustration style with a focus on clarity and a calming blue and white color palette.

name: ghostty-config
description: A beautiful config generator for Ghostty terminal.
readme_summary: Ghostty Config is a web-based tool that simplifies the customization of the Ghostty terminal. It provides an intuitive interface for users to visually adjust settings like fonts, colors, and cursor styles, with live previews, and then export a ready-to-use configuration file.
key_features: Interactive settings editor for fonts, colors, cursor styles, transparency, blur, etc.
Font playground with support for various font types.
Live previews of cursors, selections, app icons, and color palettes.
One-click export of Ghostty configuration files.
primary_use_case: To provide a user-friendly, visual interface for generating and customizing configuration files for the Ghostty terminal.
cover_image_prompt: A friendly, stylized architect character meticulously arranging glowing blocks of color and font styles on a blueprint. The blueprint itself is a stylized representation of a terminal window, showing elements like cursors and color palettes being placed. Digital particles representing configuration data flow from the architect's tools to the blueprint. Subtle UI elements resembling a web interface are visible on a nearby tablet. The scene is clean, bright, and modern, with a focus on intuitive design. The style should be a 3D isometric illustration with vibrant, harmonious colors, emphasizing ease of use and creative customization for the Ghostty terminal.
